Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Elder (The Elder Empire: Sea)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Elders are entities that Watchmen face down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Elders can be chained to ships to protect them from Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Not all Elders are soul-devouring, grotesque monsters from legends.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Chains can be invested to restrain an Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Elders can manifest as flesh on walls that grows rapidly and heals wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — The sparks seen by Urzaia are not Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Elder is a type of power found in Jerri's Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Elders are powerful entities that can capsize ships.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Elders desire the fall of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Tommison's crew died under mysterious Elder-related circumstances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Calder Read an Elder.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
